pi_items.source: Equipment inventory lists '4x Shure SM7B Dynamic Microphones' in setup_task.sh
Equipment inventory lists '4x Cloudlifter CL-1 Mic Activators' in setup_task.sh
Equipment inventory lists '1x RodeCaster Pro II' in setup_task.sh
Equipment inventory lists '1x Studio PC' in setup_task.sh
Equipment inventory lists '1x Behringer HA8000 V2' in setup_task.sh
Equipment inventory lists '4x Sony MDR-7506 Professional Headphones' in setup_task.sh

Equipment inventory lists '2x Yamaha HS8 Powered Studio Monitors (Left/Right)' in setup_task.sh, line 25. This represents a stereo pair of monitors, confirmed via web search of Yamaha HS8 product pages showing they are sold as pairs.
Wiring schedule (setup_task.sh) specifies 'XLR Cable' for microphone input chains (lines 37, 39)
Wiring schedule (setup_task.sh) specifies 'TRS 1/4" Balanced Cables' and 'TRS 1/4" Coiled Cables' for monitoring (lines 44, 49, 53)
Wiring schedule (setup_task.sh line 58) specifies 'USB-C Cable' for digital interface, not generic USB. Metadata lists 'USB' which is less specific than the actual cable type.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real professional audio equipment from established manufacturers (Shure, Rode, Yamaha, Sony, Behringer, Cloud Microphones). The equipment inventory specifies 2x Yamaha HS8 studio monitors (left/right stereo pair) but metadata claims only 1 monitor node required. The wiring schedule specifies USB-C cables for digital interface but metadata lists generic 'USB'. All other node counts (4 microphones, 4 cloudlifters, 1 mixer, 1 PC, 1 headphone amp, 4 headphones) are verified. File paths for .drawio and .png outputs are correct.
